ui.shop.confirm.title: Confirm Purchase
ui.shop.confirm.pack: Are you sure you want to purchase {0} for {1}g?
ui.shop.confirm.relic: Are you sure you want to purchase {0} for {1}g?
ui.shop.trade.title: Trade
ui.shop.trade.info:
Select 2 relics of the same rarity to receive 1 random relic of the next higher rarity.

Some specific relic combinations may yield a unique relic instead of a random one.

If no eligible combination is found, you'll receive a random relic as usual.
